sentences.arabic: يَحْتَفِلُ الْمُسْلِمُونَ بِعِيدِ الْفِطْرِ بَعْدَ انْتِهَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ الْمُبَارَكِ.
sentences.translation: Muslimani slave Ramazanski bajram nakon završetka blagoslovljenog mjeseca ramazana.
sentences.translationEn: Muslims celebrate Eid al-Fitr after the end of the blessed month of Ramadan.

sentences.arabic: يَرْتَدِي الْأَطْفَالُ مَلَابِسَ جَدِيدَةً وَيَذْهَبُونَ لِزِيَارَةِ الْأَقَارِبِ وَالْجِيرَانِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca oblače novu odjeću i idu u posjetu rodbini i komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: Children wear new clothes and go to visit relatives and neighbors.

sentences.arabic: يُعْطِي الْكِبَارُ "الْعِيدِيَّةَ" لِلصِّغَارِ لِإِدْخَالِ السُّرُورِ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Odrasli daju "bajramluk" djeci kako bi ih obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: Adults give "Eidiya" (money gifts) to the young ones to bring joy to their hearts.

sentences.arabic: تَمْتَلِئُ الشَّوَارِعُ بِالزِّينَةِ وَتَعُمُّ الْفَرْحَةُ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ.
sentences.translation: Ulice su ispunjene ukrasima, a radost se širi posvuda.
sentences.translationEn: The streets are filled with decorations, and joy spreads everywhere.
